Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ZIBTEK LLC's Motion For Assignment Order.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for assignment order" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Continued To Oct-20-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Motion For Entry Of Prove-Up Hearing Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Cosimo Spera as an individual, dba Beebel, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Lorna Walker, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Zibtek LLC a limited liability company.
Cache Merrill, Chief Executive Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Merrill also appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Cosimo Spera as an individual, dba Beebel, Inc.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Money was filed on June 4, 2018 and personally on Cosimo Spera as an individual, dba Beebel, Inc. on December 5, 2018.
Default was entered on September 5, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 10, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Zibtek LLC, a limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Cosimo Spera as an individual, dba Beebel, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $44,558.18. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $17,476.57.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $955.45.

Total - $65,815.20.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
